Home › Services

Villa design services in Jeddah

Focused design paths for private villa clients in Jeddah and across the Gulf. Choose what fits your plot and vision — each begins with a free call and a free preliminary concept.

Villa design in Jeddah

The starting point for landowners and families: how we design a private villa in Jeddah from concept to construction.

Learn more →

Luxury villa design in Jeddah

For luxury villas that balance privacy, hospitality, refined detail and long-term value.

Learn more →

Modern villa design in Jeddah

Clean lines, natural light and a seamless indoor–outdoor relationship — for clients who prefer modern architecture.

Learn more →

Obhur villa design

For coastal plots in Obhur and North Jeddah: sea light, waterfront privacy and outdoor living.

Learn more →

Modern Hijazi villa design

Reinterpreting Hijazi architecture — rawasheen, courtyards and stone — in a modern language for life today.

Learn more →

Ready to review your plot?

A free call, then a free preliminary concept — we only begin a paid agreement after the direction is clear and aligned.

Send plot details WhatsApp
WB Studio

A personal architecture practice for private villas and homes across Jeddah, Saudi Arabia and the Gulf — shaped by clarity, restraint and long-term value.
